name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Francisco, CA's MoneyGram at 5483 Mission St offers check cashing and money transfer services with convenient extended hours.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 5483 Mission St in San Francisco, CA is a standalone check-cashing store serving the Mission District community. This San Francisco branch operates with extended hours to accommodate local residents: Monday through Friday 8AM–8PM, Saturday 8AM–6PM, and Sunday 9AM–5PM.

At this San Francisco MoneyGram location, you can access a range of financial services including check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment options. Whether you need to send money domestically or internationally, the knowledgeable staff at the Mission St branch can assist. Call +1 415-469-2174 to confirm service availability or ask questions before your visit.

Planning to visit the San Francisco MoneyGram? Bring a valid government-issued ID (driver's license, passport, or state ID) and arrive during posted hours—this location's extended evening and weekend availability makes it convenient for busy schedules. MoneyGram provides secure, reliable money services when you need them most.
pros: 16+ convenient locations across San Francisco minimizing travel distance for customers
Partnerships with major retailers (CVS, Lucky supermarket) and dedicated agents providing multiple touchpoints
Extended operating hours with many locations opening at 7:00-7:30 AM to serve early commuters
Online and offline service options allowing customers to initiate transfers remotely
Serves underbanked and immigrant communities with accessible money transfer and remittance services
Real-time location search with map integration and phone numbers for immediate access
Quick transaction processing enabling same-day money movement
cons: No fee transparency on website—customers cannot compare costs before visiting a location
Service quality and staff expertise varies significantly across partner retail locations
Limited integration with digital banking—primarily cash and in-person focused, not competitive with fintech alternatives
Reliance on third-party retailers means reduced control over brand experience and customer service consistency
No information provided about transfer speed guarantees, error resolution, or customer support accessibility
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking services
Immigrants and workers sending remittances to family members domestically or internationally
Customers needing same-day cash access in specific neighborhoods without reliable bank branches
Small business owners and gig workers requiring quick bill payment and cash movement solutions
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants sending remittances, and workers needing rapid cash access in underserved neighborhoods. The primary caveat is that fees and transfer speeds are not disclosed on their website, and service quality depends heavily on individual partner location quality and staff competence.
services: In-person cash pickups at partner locations
Online transfer initiation with offline completion
Cash access points across distributed retail network
Location finder and mapping for nearest agents
meta_description: MoneyGram at 5483 Mission St, San Francisco, CA. Check cashing and money transfers with extended hours.
